category_sources: Official SML/NJ homepage describes it as a compiler for Standard ML '97 with libraries, tools, and documentation
source_facts.description says compiler and programming system for Standard ML
display_name_sources: Official GitHub organization page uses Standard ML of New Jersey
Official SML/NJ homepage uses Standard ML of New Jersey and abbreviation SML/NJ
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents repository structure and information sources
Official SML/NJ User's Guide is a dedicated documentation path
Official SML/NJ homepage links documentation and literature resources
repo_sources: Official SML/NJ GitHub organization says smlnj/smlnj is the development repository and latest version of the system
source_facts.source-archive version 2026.1 corresponds to the development release line
tags_sources: Official SML/NJ homepage describes compiler, libraries, tools, and documentation
source_facts.executables lists compiler and related tools such as sml, ml-yacc, ml-lex, and ml-build
